commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Him. In the form of a dove, John i. 32. (Haydock)
"The whole fountain of the Holy Spirit descending. "(Ev. Nazar.) (St. Jerome)
Christ was filled with his seven gifts, and of his fullness his servants receive. (Worthington)
Yet all virtues are the gifts of the holy Spirit, and the number seven is not specified in Hebrew, as the same word (Calmet) yirath, is rendered godliness, which (ver. 3.) means, the fear of the Lord. (Haydock)
God enables us to penetrate the difficulties of Scripture, and to act with prudence (Menochius)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
